positive: A majestic, stylized arctic wolf howling at a crescent moon. The wolf is rendered in a modern, geometric, minimalist style with clean black outlines and limited color palette of deep blues, icy whites, and slate grays. The background features subtle, geometric snowflake patterns and abstract mountain ranges silhouetted against a stylized, vibrant aurora borealis. Central composition, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, suitable for distressed apparel print, solid black background contrast, cinematic lighting, ultra-detail, negative space emphasis.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, multiple subjects, messy, poor anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, low detail, grainy, noise
